svg.text: • 136. Single Number — XOR of all elements
• 137. Single Number II — bit-by-bit count mod 3
• 260. Single Number III — XOR then split by a differing bit
• 191. Number of 1 Bits — Brian Kernighan or popcount
• 338. Counting Bits — DP using f[i] = f[i >> 1] + (i & 1)
• 187. Repeated DNA Sequences — encode 4-letter alphabet in 2 bits
• 421. Maximum XOR of Two Numbers — bit-trie greedy descent
• 1255. Maximum Score Words — bitmask over selected words
• 1457. Pseudo-Palindromic Paths — XOR digit mask along DFS
• 847. Shortest Path Visiting All Nodes — BFS over (node, visited mask)
When n ≤ 20, bitmask DP is the canonical optimisation tool.
